reviews.review_msg: Super easy prof and very generous with marks. I got one of the highest marks on the midterm and i didnt even open the textbook! One paper, and a final. The final was an essay and it was take home style. Super chill prof, just put a bit of effort and it will go a long way.

Very unorganized and vague criteria. Required weekly summaries of readings and group presentations but would push back each groups presentation so many groups did not have to present. Participation is worth 20% but not once did he take attendance.
Gives tough comments but quite useful; At the same time grading is fair

A tough course in general, Sanjay is your best bet. Lectures were dense w/ info, was hard to keep up. Explained concepts in 15 sentences when it could've been 5. Rubrics were not very clear, assignment expectations were ambiguous, TAs are tough markers. You could lose marks for missing items that aren't listed in the guidelines.
